lines.speaker: Guild Hunter Aco (Expert)
lines.text: Hunter Aco reporting for duty!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: [Player name] reporting for... nothing in particular, really.

lines.speaker: Guild Hunter Aco (Expert)
lines.text: What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you do here?

lines.speaker: Guild Hunter Aco (Expert)
lines.text: Hunting, mostly.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmm, I probably could've guessed that.

lines.speaker: Guild Hunter Aco (Expert)
lines.text: Perhaps you confused me for Teco over there? He's more into plants and all that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What got you into hunting then?

lines.speaker: Guild Hunter Aco (Expert)
lines.text: Don't tell too many people, but it's much nicer here than wearing a uniform and marching around!

lines.speaker: Guild Hunter Aco (Expert)
lines.text: I'm still not sure how I feel about having Teco around the whole time though. People confuse us too often for my liking.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: See you later.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I get a rumour?

lines.speaker: Guild Hunter Aco (Expert)
lines.text: You're new here, aren't you? You might want to talk to Verity before you get started.

lines.speaker: Guild Hunter Aco (Expert)
lines.text: Could you check out the validity of this report for me? Someone thinks they've seen a [creature]. Once you find it, bring back one of its [rare parts].

lines.speaker: Guild Hunter Aco (Expert)
lines.text: There's been rumours of a rare [creature] coming in. Once you find it, bring back one of its [rare parts].

lines.speaker: Guild Hunter Aco (Expert)
lines.text: We've got reports of a slightly different [creature] in the local population. Once you find it, bring back one of its [rare parts].

lines.speaker: Guild Hunter Aco (Expert)
lines.text: Looks like we need some information on a unique specimen amongst the local [creature] population. Once you find it, bring back some of its [rare parts].

lines.speaker: Guild Hunter Aco (Expert)
lines.text: I've heard rumours of a strange [creature] that you could check out for me. Once you find it, bring back one of its [rare parts].

lines.speaker: Guild Hunter Aco (Expert)
lines.text: Thanks for doing that for me. Here's your reward.

lines.speaker: Guild Hunter Aco (Expert)
lines.text: Would you like another rumour?

lines.speaker: Guild Hunter Aco (Expert)
lines.text: Thanks for that. I'll mark off that report for you. Would you like another rumour?

lines.speaker: Guild Hunter Aco (Expert)
lines.text: You're hunting for me at the moment. This rumour was about a [creature]. You'll need to bring back some of its [rare parts].

lines.speaker: Guild Hunter Aco (Expert)
lines.text: I hear you're hunting for [Guild Hunter]. Aren't you looking for a [creature] at the moment? You'll need to bring back some of its [rare parts].

lines.speaker: Guild Hunter Aco (Expert)
lines.text: Unless you fancy hunting for me instead?

lines.speaker: Guild Hunter Aco (Expert)
lines.text: Now then... I asked you to hunt a [creature] for me and bring back one of its [rare parts].

lines.speaker: Guild Hunter Aco (Expert)
lines.text: Heard we're having an intel reshuffle. You should probably focus on your current task for now.

lines.speaker: Guild Hunter Aco (Expert)
lines.text: Gilman said that you're doing some work for him right now. I won't interfere with that.

lines.speaker: Guild Hunter Aco (Expert)
lines.text: We're all having a rest, but don't you have something to be getting on with?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Never mind.
